overall.description: First-person nighttime walk along a dark forest trail. The footage begins near a rocky stream bed and transitions to a dirt path surrounded by dense trees, with an artificial light source appearing on the left side midway through the clip.

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in near-total darkness at a rocky stream bed. The camera holder walks carefully over uneven stones, with a tree trunk visible on the left and dense vegetation on the right. A narrow dirt path leads forward into the forest.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dirt forest trail surrounded by dense vegetation on both sides. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow enclosed path, with occasional glimpses of night sky visible through the tree canopy ahead. The rocky terrain is left behind as the path becomes smoother.

artificial light source fades into the distance as camera continues past it

segments.scene_description: A bright artificial light source appears on the left, casting illumination on the nearby trees and path. The camera continues walking forward, passing the light source which gradually fades behind. The trail continues through dense forest, returning to low-light conditions as the light source is left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, rocky stream bed into the depths of a dense forest trail. It begins with a careful walk over uneven stones in near-total darkness, flanked by a tree trunk and thick vegetation. As the camera moves forward, the rocky terrain gives way to a smoother dirt path that feels increasingly enclosed by the surrounding woods, with only occasional glimpses of the night sky through the canopy. The scene then shifts as a bright artificial light source appears on the left, momentarily illuminating the nearby trees and path before the camera passes it. Finally, the light fades into the distance, returning the environment to low-light conditions as the walk continues deeper into the forest.
